data.name: MultiProgressControl_Display
data.value: Multi Progress
data.comment: Display name for the control

data.name: MultiProgressControl_Desc
data.value: Read-only status control. Shows up to 6 Whole-Number columns as progress indicators (0-100%) in a single row.
data.comment: Description for the control

data.name: field1_Display
data.value: Field 1
data.comment: Display name for bound slot 1 (the host field)

data.name: field1_Desc
data.value: The Whole-Number column shown as the first indicator. This is the field the control is bound to.
data.comment: Description for bound slot 1

data.name: field2_Display
data.value: Field 2
data.comment: Display name for bound slot 2

data.name: field2_Desc
data.value: Optional Whole-Number column shown as the second indicator.
data.comment: Description for bound slot 2

data.name: field3_Display
data.value: Field 3
data.comment: Display name for bound slot 3

data.name: field3_Desc
data.value: Optional Whole-Number column shown as the third indicator.
data.comment: Description for bound slot 3

data.name: field4_Display
data.value: Field 4
data.comment: Display name for bound slot 4

data.name: field4_Desc
data.value: Optional Whole-Number column shown as the fourth indicator.
data.comment: Description for bound slot 4

data.name: field5_Display
data.value: Field 5
data.comment: Display name for bound slot 5

data.name: field5_Desc
data.value: Optional Whole-Number column shown as the fifth indicator.
data.comment: Description for bound slot 5

data.name: field6_Display
data.value: Field 6
data.comment: Display name for bound slot 6

data.name: field6_Desc
data.value: Optional Whole-Number column shown as the sixth indicator.
data.comment: Description for bound slot 6

data.name: label1_Display
data.value: Label 1
data.comment: Display name for the caption override of slot 1

data.name: label1_Desc
data.value: Caption for indicator 1. Leave empty to use the bound column's display name.
data.comment: Description for the caption override of slot 1

data.name: label2_Display
data.value: Label 2
data.comment: Display name for the caption override of slot 2

data.name: label2_Desc
data.value: Caption for indicator 2. Leave empty to use the bound column's display name.
data.comment: Description for the caption override of slot 2

data.name: label3_Display
data.value: Label 3
data.comment: Display name for the caption override of slot 3

data.name: label3_Desc
data.value: Caption for indicator 3. Leave empty to use the bound column's display name.
data.comment: Description for the caption override of slot 3

data.name: label4_Display
data.value: Label 4
data.comment: Display name for the caption override of slot 4

data.name: label4_Desc
data.value: Caption for indicator 4. Leave empty to use the bound column's display name.
data.comment: Description for the caption override of slot 4

data.name: label5_Display
data.value: Label 5
data.comment: Display name for the caption override of slot 5

data.name: label5_Desc
data.value: Caption for indicator 5. Leave empty to use the bound column's display name.
data.comment: Description for the caption override of slot 5

data.name: label6_Display
data.value: Label 6
data.comment: Display name for the caption override of slot 6

data.name: label6_Desc
data.value: Caption for indicator 6. Leave empty to use the bound column's display name.
data.comment: Description for the caption override of slot 6

data.name: maxValue_Display
data.value: Maximum Value (100%)
data.comment: Display name for the maxValue property

data.name: maxValue_Desc
data.value: The column value that represents 100%. Defaults to 100 (columns already store a percentage).
data.comment: Description for the maxValue property

data.name: headerLabel_Display
data.value: Header
data.comment: Display name for the optional header caption

data.name: headerLabel_Desc
data.value: Optional caption shown above the row of indicators. Leave empty for no header.
data.comment: Description for the optional header caption
